data.content: Plan review approved. The implementation plan is sound and well-scoped. Key observations: (1) 3 of 4 lease-to-metadata field mappings already exist in write_dispatch.rs — only username←provider is missing for both note and handoff paths. (2) resolve_lease_agent_info() already centralizes lease identity lookup. (3) Test infrastructure exists in tests_lease_ext.rs but needs username assertions and handoff capsule coverage. (4) No architectural concerns — change is small, backward-compatible, and follows existing patterns. (5) The plan correctly identifies provider as the source for username, which is the only durable lease identity field for that purpose. Ready for implementation.
